matchingDescription: UK largest investment platform, stocks and shares ISA, SIPP, fund supermarket, over 1.8 million clients

variants.text: Hargreaves Lansdown is the UK's largest investment platform — manage your ISA, SIPP, and investments in one place. Over 1.8 million clients. Capital at risk.
Open a Stocks and Shares ISA or SIPP with Hargreaves Lansdown — access thousands of investments with expert research tools. Capital at risk.

Hargreaves Lansdown administers over £140bn in assets on behalf of 1.8 million UK clients — making it the largest investment platform in the UK by both assets and client count, ahead of AJ Bell and interactive investor.

HMRC data shows approximately 4,000 UK ISA accounts hold more than £1 million, accumulated entirely through tax-free growth over the ISA's 25-year history. The maximum contribution has risen from £7,000 in 1999 to £20,000 today.

The average UK pension pot at retirement is £61,897 according to the Pensions Policy Institute — significantly below the £237,000 estimated to fund a moderate retirement. Starting a SIPP in your 30s rather than 40s can more than double the final pot size.

A 1% annual fund charge on a £50,000 pension over 25 years (assuming 7% growth) costs approximately £43,000 in foregone returns. Comparing ongoing charge figures (OCF) across fund options is one of the highest-impact decisions an investor makes.
